scene: Stan melting into a puddle of soup at his desk, a spoon in his bowl-shaped head, wall clock 3:00, flat beige office filling the tall frame, big black caps 3 PM.
A sandwich shrugging with a speech bubble NOT ME, a red arrow pointing up at a wall clock, flat beige filling the tall frame, big black caps NOT LUNCH.
Two Stans side by side, one with a lunch and one without, both crashing identically, flat beige filling the tall frame, big black caps SAME DIP.
A simple cross-section of Stan's head with a little clock inside dimming the lights, flat beige filling the tall frame, big black caps DIMMING THE LIGHTS.
A big round 24-hour clock holding a hidden SCHEDULE clipboard behind its back, a small Stan, flat blue filling the tall frame, big black caps A HIDDEN SCHEDULE.
